subject: English
skill: Describe a Picture with a Sentence

lesson.story_mission: Help the Reading Ranger complete the Describe a Picture with a Sentence trail.
lesson.objective: I can practice describe a picture with a sentence with careful listening, reading, or writing.
lesson.concept_explanation: This mission teaches describe a picture with a sentence using child-friendly models and short practice steps. Describe the picture by naming it, telling an action, and adding a clear detail.
lesson.common_misconception: Learners may answer from a first clue instead of checking the whole word, sentence, or story.
lesson.real_world_connection: Readers and writers use this skill in books, signs, notes, and classroom talk.
lesson.lesson_summary: Read or listen carefully, use the model, then choose or write the answer.
lesson.mini_lesson: First study the model. Then say the sounds or words slowly. Last, check that your answer matches the prompt.

worked_examples.text: Watch: Use the picture_prompt model, name the important part, then answer.
Demo: Try one with help before independent practice.

hint_ladder: Listen for the target sound or word part.
Check your answer with the model.

incomplete_description: Review incomplete description with a teacher model.
missing_action: Review missing action with a teacher model.
vague_detail: Review vague detail with a teacher model.
sentence_fragment: Review sentence fragment with a teacher model.
